message:
perf(search): Implement cache key string interning (Opt 2.3)

Add StringInterner with LRU eviction to reduce memory usage for repeated
cache key patterns. Cache keys are now Arc<str> instead of String, enabling
memory sharing for identical queries.

Changes:
- Add StringInterner struct with thread-safe LRU cache
- Global CACHE_KEY_INTERNER with 10K entry limit (~1MB)
- Update CacheShards to use Arc<str> for both shard names and keys
- Update cache_key() to return interned Arc<str>
- Add 6 unit tests for interner functionality

Expected improvement: 5-10% memory reduction under sustained query load.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
